task: Docs-only design spec for the gated Relay internal-bank + diesel-code build (Section D #2). Captures Jorge's exact Relay workflow: Relay as a PRE-FUNDED internal bank account (no credit), WF->Relay transfers post as credits, every withdrawal (diesel code/toll/scale) posts as a debit expense ON THE DAY GENERATED, whole feed uploaded + matched via standard bank reconciliation (two-date principle). Documents the diesel-code request flow (driver requests -> dispatcher approves in Driver Hub -> code delivered + expense auto-created carrying load/driver/reefer-hours/STATE+LOCATION). Phase 1 manual typed code (editable, audited); Phase 2 Relay API auto-issue (source MANUAL|RELAY_API field, mirrors PC*Miler/Samsara phasing). STATE+LOCATION is the SAME field IFTA needs (build once, shared with MILEAGE-MODEL-DESIGN). Account model, category map, recon, audit (VOID != DELETE), open questions for Jorge, gated build sequence. NO code, no DDL, no posting, no money path. Designed live with Jorge + GUARD-reviewed before merge.
